description:
Defines name of current scope. Name is visible in debugger, and name is also used as reference in some commands like [[breakOut]] and [[breakTo]].
Scope name should be defined only once per scope. Trying to set a different name on the scope that has already defined scope name will result in error.
examples:
<sqf>
scopeName "main";
while { sleep 0.1; true } do
{
	scopeName "loop1";

	while { sleep 0.1; true } do
	{
		scopeName "loop2";

		// ...
	};
};
</sqf>
name: scopeName
